description_long: This is a dark-colored bottle with a long neck and a rounded base, resembling a champagne or sparkling wine bottle. The bottle features a gold foil or label around the neck and a prominent label on the front, with some visible text and decorative elements. The top of the bottle is sealed with a cork, which is partially exposed and appears to have been popped, with the cork and some leafy debris floating above the bottle. The bottle's surface shows a mix of glossy and matte areas, with some discoloration and irregularities suggesting wear or residue. The overall shape is classic for celebratory beverages, and the bottle appears to be made primarily of glass. The floating cork and debris add a dynamic, post-celebration feel to the object.
description: A dark glass bottle with a gold neck label and popped cork, resembling a champagne bottle with some leafy debris above it. The surface shows signs of wear and residue.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the side, with the cork and leafy debris clearly separated above the neck; the label is not fully visible.
description_view_1: The front label is visible, showing some text and decorative elements, with the cork and debris above; the gold neck label is prominent.
description_view_2: The bottle is viewed from another side, with the cork and debris above; the gold neck label is visible but the main label is less clear.
description_view_3: The back of the bottle is shown, with minimal label detail and the cork and debris above; the bottle appears darker and less detailed.
attribute_label_or_branding: There is a visible label on the front of the bottle with some text and decorative elements, primarily in white and gold, but the text is not fully legible.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: The bottle shows some discoloration, residue, and irregularities on the surface, but no major cracks or dents are visible.
